SubLayerProcessing.SQLScript:
WITH THIS AS(
 SELECT DISTINCT
       poCode AS providerOrgID
      ,poName AS providerOrgName
 FROM MAMembershipStars
 WHERE 
 poCode IS NOT NULL 
)
SELECT 
   sha2(concat(providerOrgID,'|',providerOrgName),256) AS providerOrgKey
  ,providerOrgID
  ,providerOrgName
FROM THIS
UNION ALL
SELECT
 '-1' AS providerOrgKey
,'unknown' AS providerOrgID
,'unknown' AS providerOrgName
SubLayerProcessing.MergeScript:
MERGE INTO DestinationTable t
USING (SELECT * FROM tempSQLScript)s
  ON s.providerOrgID = t.providerOrgID 
  AND s.providerOrgName = t.providerOrgName
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT
(
   providerOrgKey
  ,providerOrgID
  ,providerOrgName
)
VALUES
(
 s.providerOrgKey
,s.providerOrgID
,s.providerOrgName
)
